= 2026-04-29 – Conformance and certification program

* Documented a CentrMark Conformance Test Suite (CTS) and certification registry concept, aiming to keep behavior consistent across implementations.
* Defined the standardized contracts the CTS can validate: parsing correctness, canonical AST outputs, determinism, and optional diagnostic behavior.
* Added guidance for low-cost hosting and how trademark wording should be restricted to registry-approved, spec-version-pinned certifications.
